task_completion.description: Verify that the VFR Sectional chart display is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view in the application displays a VFR Sectional chart, identifiable by its topographical colors, airspace rings, or a 'Sectional' label in the active map layers/settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the flight plan is named PNW_TOUR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flight plan interface is open and the name field or header explicitly shows 'PNW_TOUR'.

task_completion.description: Verify that KSEA and KPDX are added to the flight plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The waypoints list in the flight plan interface includes 'KSEA' and 'KPDX'.

task_completion.description: Verify that KEUG and KMFR are added to the flight plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The waypoints list in the flight plan interface includes 'KEUG' and 'KMFR'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the flight plan is saved as PNW_TOUR.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager window, or application confirmation message showing the file 'PNW_TOUR.csv' being saved or existing in the directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the flight planning software's GUI to create the plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with a flight planning application's interface (menus, map, waypoint lists) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV file was not simply typed out in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or Notepad) being used to manually write the 'PNW_TOUR.csv' file contents.

integrity.description: Verify the map view is part of the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sectional chart is displayed within the flight planning application's map view, not as a static image opened in an image viewer or a web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required plan name: PNW_TOUR. Required chart: Sectional. Required waypoints: KSEA (Seattle-Tacoma), KPDX (Portland), KEUG (Eugene), KMFR (Medford). The flight plan must be saved as PNW_TOUR.csv. VFR Sectional charts are the standard for VFR training flights.
